lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Build us a stove mate, I'm absolutely starvin!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You must be really tired from the journey, you did so much.

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: ...So my expertise were not required this time, a man's still gotta eat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess I'll get building then...

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: About these eggs… Odd colour, don't cha think?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The birds here are a little exotic, apparently.

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: Hmm, well, good effort, but I'll pass on the grub this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I gave you a box?

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: I'm not sure that'll change my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If not a box, then what about a fox?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A mouse, a house? Would these change your mind?

lines.speaker: David
lines.text: For the love of Saradomin, please leave me be

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will! I promise! Just try them and you'll see.
